title: TargetProfile
description: Characterization of the agent under test. Produced by the Cartographer (roles/01-cartographer.md) from the adapter's describe() output. Project-agnostic: nothing here names a specific target.

version.description: Target build/version if known; conclusions are version-scoped.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the profile was captured. Provided by the operator/harness (never invented).

tools.description: Tool catalog the agent can call.

owner.description: Which subagent/layer holds this tool, if applicable.

gated_by.description: Any HITL/tier/flag gate on this tool.

routing.description: Expected routing rules: intent class -> which layer/subagent/tool handles it.

constraints.description: Hard limits that bound realistic execution.

call_budget.description: Session-wide tool-call ceiling, or null if none exists (itself a finding).

guards.description: Named guardrails (loop-guard, input validators, SSRF, etc.).

known_outages.description: Sources/tools currently unavailable — simulation must respect these.

source_precedence.description: When sources disagree, the declared authority order.

failure_domains.description: A-priori areas the target is expected to be weak in; seeds scenario emphasis but never presumes the verdict.

capability_gaps_known.description: Questions the target legitimately cannot answer (used to score tool-coverage fairly).
